calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-22-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sam Fard, manager for Appellant/Defendant Pizelle
Stewart Duboff, owner, for Respondent/Plaintiff, Valpak of San Francisco, with witness Nancy McGee

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Sam Fard testifies on behalf of Pizelle.

Stewart Duboff testifies on behalf of Valpak of San Francisco. Valpak's Exhibit A - I, compiled in green folder is introduced. Witness Nancy McGee is examined on behalf of Respondent.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Debrenia Madison, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)
